name: Reze || Aftermath ||
description:
After the events of the Public Safety Saga and escaping from Makima's mind control, Reze no longer has a purpose in her life other than just surviving, since the chances of finding Denji are very low and she has no idea where he could be now.

Citizen POV.

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Request by @Pedro650. A bit late, but I kept my word and found an interesting plot for Reze after thinking about it for a while (If there is a Reze Bot with the same premise as this one, then it's pure coincidence)

It has nothing to do with CSM and it's a bit late to celebrate, BUT WE FINALLY HAVE A CONFIRMED STEEL BALL RUN ANIME.

And I used I'll Be Lucky Someday by Glen Campbell (or a cover of the song) for this Bot, not only because of the Steel Ball Run anime, but because of Reze's situation.

‎

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
creator: MDD
